title: Is there a way to get updates added to a board? shouldn't include updates from items.
excerpt: Hi there, I’m playing around with the Monday API for updates and it returns updates added to both the board and the item. Is there a way to only fetch updates for the board when requesting the board and not get the item …

posts.author: ParthAtRewind (Parth)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there, I’m playing around with the Monday API for updates and it returns updates added to both the board and the item. Is there a way to only fetch updates for the board when requesting the board and not get the item ones?

I know we can get updates added to an item, but I’m looking for a way to get updates for the board only.

Thanks
